summary: Read-only R10 skeptical acceptance review completed. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED because executable acceptance gates still have false-green gaps: missing planned verifier registry entries in verify:goal, install/release/Observatory not globally gated, current health needs_attention from task lifecycle, RAG is scaffold-only despite healthy subreports, and behavior recall current status can be healthy without required trigger coverage.
decisions: Read-only review only; no verifier commands were executed because they may write artifacts.
Current user instruction and local evidence were treated as controlling.
next_steps: Wire missing acceptance verifiers into verify:goal.
Make behavior recall and RAG current statuses reflect completion-grade blockers explicitly.
